calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DENIS KLAVDIANOS of Glassberg, Pollak & Associates, Tel No. (415) 291-8320 appearing for the Petitioner;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MAINSTREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
